title: Checkout database write failures
summary: Use this runbook when checkout order writes fail after a deployment or schema change.
symptoms: Database insert failures in checkout-service logs

steps.title: Confirm recent deployment
steps.action: Compare the first failing checkout log timestamp with the latest checkout-service deployment timestamp.

steps.title: Inspect migration changes
steps.action: Review database migration changes for new required columns, constraints, or missing defaults.

steps.title: Prepare safe rollback
steps.action: If the migration is causing failed writes, prepare a rollback plan for the application and migration; require incident commander approval before production changes.

steps.title: Correct migration
steps.action: Add a safe default or backfill path for the required column before reapplying the schema change.
